title: LIP01: Selectable with href
code:
<gds-div display="block" width="100%">
  <gds-list>
    <gds-list-item-pattern-01 selectable href="/accounts/5678">
      <gds-flex flex-direction="column" justify-content="center" text-align="start" gap="4xs">
        <gds-text font="detail-s-regular" tag="label">Label</gds-text>
        <gds-text font="detail-m-book">Value</gds-text>
      </gds-flex>
    </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
    <gds-list-item-pattern-01 selectable checked href="/accounts/5679">
      <gds-flex flex-direction="column" justify-content="center" text-align="start" gap="4xs">
        <gds-text font="detail-s-regular" tag="label">Label</gds-text>
      </gds-flex>
      <gds-flex flex-direction="column" justify-content="center" text-align="start" gap="4xs">
        <gds-text font="detail-s-regular">Value</gds-text>
      </gds-flex>
    </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
  </gds-list>
</gds-div>
